articles.title: Score an RTX 5070 prebuilt with a Ryzen 7 7700X & 16 GB of DDR5 for $650 off — Stack these promo codes to save on Skytech Gaming's high-end systems
articles.summary: You don't need to spend upwards of $1,500 to build and RTX 5070 system anymore as Skytech has two great prebuilts ready for you. Whether you're rocking a stealthy black setup or a minimal white one, the Shadow 5 and Archangel 5 are both ready to level it up.
articles.title_zh: 以 $650 的折扣購買 RTX 5070 預組電腦，配備 Ryzen 7 7700X 與 16 GB DDR5 — 堆疊多個促銷代碼在 Skytech Gaming 高端系統上節省費用
articles.summary_zh: Skytech 推出兩款優質預組電腦 Shadow 5 和 Archangel 5，讓你無須花費超過 $1,500 就能擁有 RTX 5070 系統。無論你偏好隱沒的黑色或簡約的白色設計，這兩款都能滿足你的需求。

articles.title: Steam Controller leaked review points to $99 MSRP — more expensive than PS5 and Xbox controllers and Nintendo Joy-Cons
articles.summary: A hardware reviewer accidentally made their review video go live on YouTube before the embargo date, revealing the pricing for the Steam Controller.
articles.title_zh: Steam Controller 洩露評測揭示 $99 定價 — 比 PS5、Xbox 控制器和 Nintendo Joy-Cons 更昂貴
articles.summary_zh: 一位硬體評測者意外在禁令日期前將評測影片發佈到 YouTube 上，揭露了 Steam Controller 的定價。

articles.title: Intel's upcoming Xeon 7 "Diamond Rapids" server CPUs reportedly delayed to 2027 — Next-gen Coral Rapids lineup lands 2028 but can be accelerated, according to new leak
articles.summary: Diamond Rapids, also known as Xeon 7, was supposed to launch later this year, but a new leak from Jaykihn claims the timeline has now moved to 2027. Clearwater Forest, the E-core-only successor to Sierra Forest, is set to release in the first half of this year, while the next-gen Coral Rapids family is reportedly planned for 2028.
articles.title_zh: Intel 即將推出的 Xeon 7「Diamond Rapids」伺服器 CPU 據報延期至 2027 年 — 下一代 Coral Rapids 系列定於 2028 年推出但可加速上市，根據新洩露
articles.summary_zh: 原定於今年晚些時候推出的 Xeon 7（Diamond Rapids）據新洩露消息稱現已延期至 2027 年。E-core 專用的 Clearwater Forest（Sierra Forest 的後繼者）預計將於今年上半年發佈，而下一代 Coral Rapids 系列將於 2028 年推出。

articles.title: Indie App Spotlight: ‘InnerPulse’ is an in depth, private, and on-device mood tracker
articles.summary: Welcome to Indie App Spotlight . This is a weekly 9to5Mac series where we showcase the latest apps in the indie app world. If you’re a developer and would like your app featured, get in contact . Mood tracking apps can be really important and useful, whether you want to be more mindful – or if you need to track it for your therapist. That said, lots of apps either charge a subscription, are lacking in depth, or don’t have everything you might need. InnerPulse aims to solve that, while keeping privacy at the center. more…
articles.title_zh: 獨立應用焦點：'InnerPulse' 是一款深度、隱私且本地設備的心情追蹤器
articles.summary_zh: 這是 9to5Mac 每週推薦獨立應用的系列文章。心情追蹤應用可以幫助使用者更加正念或了解自己的情緒狀態。

articles.title: Apple Vision Pro suffered from indecisive leadership – here’s how it could change
articles.summary: Apple Vision Pro has been one of the most perplexing Apple product launches in recent history. It’s meant to serve as the beginning of an all new product category for Apple – and more importantly – the next generation of computing. And yet, it feels like a complete afterthought to the company. Under John Ternus, I’m slightly hopeful that we can start to see the product live up to its full potential – though there’s also reason to be skeptical. more…
articles.title_zh: Apple Vision Pro 因領導力不足而受挫 – 以下是如何改變的方式
articles.summary_zh: Apple Vision Pro 是蘋果近年來最令人困惑的產品發佈之一，儘管它應該代表下一代計算技術，但卻感覺像是公司的附帶產品。

articles.title: The next iPad could sport a new naming scheme, thanks to new interview insight
articles.summary: It’s been well over a year since Apple debuted its last entry-level iPad, powered by the A16 chipset. The company will likely release a new version with an A18 chip in the coming months , but there’s a bigger question to be answered – what will they call it? more…
articles.title_zh: 下一代 iPad 可能因新訪談而採用新的命名方案
articles.summary_zh: 蘋果距離上次推出搭載 A16 晶片的入門級 iPad 已超過一年，新款將搭載 A18 晶片，但命名方案仍待確定。

articles.title: Google Wallet adds support for three more digital passport IDs on Android
articles.summary: Following the initial launch in two countries, Google Wallet for Android now supports three more passport IDs. more…
articles.title_zh: Google Wallet 在 Android 上新增三項數位護照 ID 支援
articles.summary_zh: 在兩個國家初步推出後，Google Wallet for Android 現已支援三項額外的護照 ID。

articles.title: What new Google Messages features are rolling out [April 2026]
articles.summary: Like other Google apps, Messages for Android A/B tests many features. It can take the RCS/SMS client a rather long time to actually launch new functionality in stable. From various reports, Google announcements , and devices we’ve checked, this is the current state of Messages. more…
articles.title_zh: Google Messages 新功能正在推出【2026年4月】
articles.summary_zh: Google Messages for Android 進行多項功能 A/B 測試，這些新功能最終推出至穩定版需要較長時間。

articles.title: OnePlus Pad 4 in for review
articles.summary: Today, we are taking a look at the new OnePlus Pad 4, the company’s latest premium Android tablet. But first, let’s do a quick unboxing. The OnePlus Pad 4 packaging is very simple, and comes in the familiar red and white colorway. Inside, the tablet itself takes very little of the vertical room, thanks to its slim 5.94mm profile. Most of the height is taken up by the 80W fast charger, along with the matching cable. There’s not much else in the box. The OnePlus Pad 4 is a relatively straightforward iterative update over the OnePlus Pad 3. It replaces the Snapdragon 8...
articles.title_zh: OnePlus Pad 4 測評中
articles.summary_zh: 本文介紹 OnePlus 最新旗艦級 Android 平板電腦 OnePlus Pad 4，包括開箱和簡要評測。

articles.title: Google might be doing away with the Fitbit brand
articles.summary: There is no doubt that Fitbit still has enormous brand recognition. Whether or not the company’s current offerings are your best option is certainly debatable, but the make carries a lot of weight. Well, who better to potentially start killing it off than Google? The company certainly has a dark track record of mishandling brands and products. The situation might not be too bad at the moment, though. We are certainly only piecing clues together, and there is no formal announcement yet. Still, people noticed that on the software side of things, in some markets (mostly European), on the...
articles.title_zh: Google 可能放棄 Fitbit 品牌
articles.summary_zh: 儘管 Fitbit 仍具有巨大品牌認可度，Google 卻可能開始逐步淘汰這個品牌。

articles.title: Google Photos AI Enhance is now live for all users
articles.summary: Google seems to be working hard on expanding its editing options in Google Photos. We recently saw the online titan add a quick facial touch-up feature. Now another similar feature has gone live. It is a very simple and straightforward “AI Enhance” button that sits beside the Enhance and Dynamic buttons that were already present in the Auto tab in the image editor. We tried it for ourselves, and while it can restore highlights and shadows quite effectively and deal with common issues caused by bad lighting and boost colors slightly, it is nothing truly spectacular in any way....
articles.title_zh: Google Photos AI Enhance 功能現已面向所有使用者上線
articles.summary_zh: Google 持續擴展 Google Photos 的編輯選項，新增簡單易用的 AI Enhance 按鈕功能。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro review
articles.summary: Introduction and unboxing Samsung owns Harman, which is the parent company of several high-profile audio brands, many of which make headphones. Yet you will find very few Samsung-branded headphones outside of the Galaxy Buds series. The company hasn’t even released over-ear headphones in years – in short, Samsung is betting that the Galaxy TWS buds are the only headphones that most people need. We have the new Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro in our ears right now – they are the best of the three-tier structure that Samsung settled on (FE, vanilla and Pro). We think these are a notable...
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy Buds4 Pro 評測
articles.summary_zh: 三星 Galaxy Buds 系列是其主要的品牌耳機產品，本文提供 Galaxy Buds4 Pro 的詳細評測。

articles.title: Weekly deals: Galaxy S26 series on discount, Pixel 10 and 10 Pro XL get big price cuts
articles.summary: The Samsung Galaxy S26 series has been on discount since it went on sale in early March. And it looks like there’s no stopping the price cuts. Meanwhile, the recently launched Galaxy A57 and Galaxy A37 are available with free gifts. Notably, a couple of Pixel phones, the OnePlus 15R, and a few Xiaomi devices have also received price cuts on Amazon UK. Samsung’s Galaxy S26, Galaxy S26+, and the Galaxy S26 Ultra are all available with £170 off, plus users are eligible to save another £100 at checkout. Samsung Galaxy S26...
articles.title_zh: 每週優惠：Galaxy S26 系列折扣、Pixel 10 和 10 Pro XL 大幅降價
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Galaxy S26 系列自三月初發售以來持續降價，同時新推出的 Galaxy A57 和 A37 提供贈品優惠。

articles.title: This Galaxy S26 series feature is coming to some older Samsung smartphones
articles.summary: Samsung introduced a feature with the Galaxy S26 series, which is coming to some older Galaxy smartphones eligible for One UI 8.5. We are talking about the improved document scanning feature, called Document Scan. Previously, when you clicked multiple pictures of documents, they weren't saved as a single PDF document. Samsung made it possible with Document Scan, which is available to Samsung Galaxy S26 users. Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra Additionally, Samsung also made it easier to access Document Scan by allowing users to add its shortcut to their phone's homescreen. Just open the...
articles.title_zh: Galaxy S26 系列功能將推送至部分舊款 Samsung 手機
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 推出的 Galaxy S26 系列改進文件掃描功能 Document Scan 將推送至符合 One UI 8.5 資格的舊款 Galaxy 手機。

articles.title: Google Pixel 10a vs Google Pixel 9a
articles.summary: We rarely come across two phones that are so similar. The newly launched Google Pixel 10a is unapologetically more or less the same phone as its predecessor, the Pixel 9a. This leaves those looking for an affordable Pixel this year in a quandary. Should you go for the newer model, or should you just save some money and get last year's. And what even are some of these minor differences that separate the two? Well, let's find out. Table of Contents: Design Display Battery Life Charging Speaker Test Performance Cameras Verdict For starters, you can compare...
articles.title_zh: Google Pixel 10a vs Google Pixel 9a
articles.summary_zh: 新推出的 Google Pixel 10a 與其前代機型 Pixel 9a 幾乎相同，這讓尋求平價 Pixel 的消費者面臨選擇困境。

articles.title: Anthropic created a test marketplace for agent-on-agent commerce
articles.summary: In a recent experiment, Anthropic created a classified marketplace where AI agents represented both buyers and sellers, striking real deals for real goods and real money.
articles.title_zh: Anthropic 建立代理商對代理商商務測試市場
articles.summary_zh: Anthropic 在最近的實驗中創建了一個分類市場，AI 代理同時代表買家和賣家，進行真實商品和真實金錢的交易。

articles.title: Maine’s governor vetoes data center moratorium
articles.summary: L.D. 307 would have imposed the country’s first statewide moratorium on new data centers — lasting, in this case, until November 1, 2027.
articles.title_zh: 緬因州州長否決數據中心暫停令
articles.summary_zh: LD 307 法案本將實施美國首個全州數據中心新建項目暫停令，有效期至 2027 年 11 月 1 日。

articles.title: OpenAI CEO apologizes to Tumbler Ridge community
articles.summary: In a letter to the residents of Tumbler Ridge, Canada, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said he is “deeply sorry” that his company failed to alert law enforcement about the suspect in a recent mass shooting.
articles.title_zh: OpenAI 執行長向 Tumbler Ridge 社區道歉
articles.summary_zh: OpenAI 執行長 Sam Altman 在致加拿大 Tumbler Ridge 居民的信中表示，他為公司未能向執法部門通報最近大規模槍擊案嫌疑人感到「深感遺憾」。

articles.title: Why Cohere is merging with Aleph Alpha
articles.summary: Canadian AI startup Cohere is taking over Germany-based Aleph Alpha with support from Lidl’s owner, Schwarz Group. With the blessing of their governments, the companies intend to offer a sovereign alternative to enterprises in an AI landscape dominated by American players.
articles.title_zh: Cohere 與 Aleph Alpha 合併的原因
articles.summary_zh: 加拿大 AI 新創公司 Cohere 將收購德國的 Aleph Alpha，獲得 Lidl 母公司 Schwarz Group 的支持，旨在為企業提供一個主權替代方案，對抗由美國公司主導的 AI 市場。

articles.title: Why Tokyo is the most important tech destination of 2026
articles.summary: SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 has four tightly defined technology domains, each backed by live demonstrations, dedicated exhibit floors, and sessions featuring the people actually building and funding these technologies globally.
articles.title_zh: 東京為何是 2026 年最重要的科技目的地
articles.summary_zh: SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 擁有四個明確定義的技術領域，各由現場演示、專屬展廳和全球技術建設者及投資者的專題會議支持。

articles.title: Apple under Ternus: what comes next for the tech giant’s hardware strategy
articles.summary: John Ternus, Apple's incoming CEO, is a hardware guy, signaling Apple may be putting devices back at the center of its strategy.
articles.title_zh: Apple 在 Ternus 領導下：科技巨頭硬體策略的未來展望
articles.summary_zh: Apple 的新任執行長 John Ternus 是硬體專家，暗示 Apple 可能將把設備放回其策略的核心位置。

articles.title: Jaeger adopts OpenTelemetry at its core to solve the AI agent observability gap
articles.summary: As software architectures evolve, observability tools must adapt. When the industry moved to microservices, distributed tracing became a necessity. Jaeger emerged as a core tool for engineers to understand those fragmented systems. Now, as organizations integrate generative AI applications and autonomous agents into production, tracing requirements are shifting again. Mapping the execution path of an AI agent involves prompt assembly, vector database retrievals, and multiple external tool calls. “By adopting the Model Context Protocol (MCP), Agent Client Protocol (ACP), and Agent–User Interaction Protocol (AG-UI), the project is building an environment where engineers and AI agents can collaborate.” Jaeger is evolving to address these new workloads. This transition involv
articles.title_zh: Jaeger 在其核心採用 OpenTelemetry 以解決 AI 代理可觀測性缺口
articles.summary_zh: 隨著軟體架構演進，可觀測性工具必須隨之適應。當業界轉向微服務時，分散式追蹤成為必要。Jaeger 作為核心工具幫助工程師理解這些碎片化系統，現在隨著組織整合生成式 AI 應用和自主系統，該工具正在進一步發展。

articles.title: California Engineer Identified in Suspected Shooting at White House Correspondents' Dinner
articles.summary: The 31-year-old engineer and self-described indie game developer is suspected of firing shots at the annual event attended by President Donald Trump, high-profile media figures, and US government officials.
articles.title_zh: 加州工程師被指在白宮記者晚宴上開槍
articles.summary_zh: 這位31歲的工程師兼自稱獨立遊戲開發者涉嫌在由川普總統、高知名度媒體人物和美國政府官員參加的年度活動中開槍。

articles.title: Beijing Warns EU After China Firms Included in Russia Sanctions
articles.summary: China said it will take necessary measures after the European Union added Chinese entities to its latest Russia sanctions package, warning that all consequences would be borne by the EU.
articles.title_zh: 中國對歐盟將中國公司納入俄羅斯制裁後發出警告
articles.summary_zh: 歐盟將中國實體添加到最新俄羅斯制裁名單後，中國表示將採取必要措施，並警告歐盟將承擔所有後果。
